description_long: This is an ornate, vintage-style armchair featuring a carved wooden frame with a natural brown finish. The seat, backrest, and armrests are upholstered in a patterned fabric with a repeating scallop motif in shades of white, gray, mustard yellow, and taupe. The backrest is oval-shaped and slightly reclined, bordered by decorative woodwork that matches the frame. The armrests are padded and upholstered, curving outward and supported by carved wooden supports. The legs are slender, fluted, and slightly tapered, with carved detailing that enhances the classical aesthetic. The overall design suggests a blend of comfort and elegance, suitable for upscale urban interiors or outdoor seating in refined public spaces.
description: A vintage-style armchair with a carved wooden frame and scallop-patterned upholstery in white, gray, yellow, and taupe. Features include a rounded backrest, padded armrests, and fluted wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front angle view showing the oval backrest, padded armrests, and detailed upholstery pattern on the seat and back.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the curved wooden frame and the full backrest upholstery with the scallop pattern.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the outward curve of the armrest and the fluted, tapered wooden legs.
description_view_3: Front-side view focusing on the padded armrest, rounded backrest, and the continuity of the patterned fabric.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, curved wooden supports
attribute_backrest_style: oval, medium-height, upholstered with carved wooden border
attribute_leg_type: fluted, tapered wooden legs with carved detailing
attribute_upholstery_pattern: scallop-patterned fabric in white, gray, yellow, and taupe
